description_long: This is a modern ergonomic swivel chair featuring a high backrest with an integrated headrest and a contoured seat for comfort. The chair is equipped with two sturdy armrests and a five-point wheeled base for stability and mobility. The central support column is telescoping, likely allowing for height adjustment, and is constructed from metal for durability. The seat and backrest appear to be padded and upholstered, possibly in a synthetic fabric or mesh, providing both support and breathability. Visible adjustment levers are present beneath the seat, suggesting customizable seating positions. The overall design is functional and sleek, suitable for office or workspace environments in urban settings.
description: A high-back ergonomic swivel chair with headrest, armrests, and a five-wheeled base, featuring padded upholstery and visible adjustment levers. The design is modern and functional, ideal for office use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high backrest with headrest, contoured seat, and both armrests clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the backrest, and the telescoping central support column.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and headrest, as well as the symmetrical five-point wheeled base.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest, seat profile, and the adjustment lever beneath the seat.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical, telescoping metal column with a matte finish, supporting the seat and connecting to the five-point wheeled base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular backrest with integrated headrest, gently contoured for ergonomic support, likely padded and upholstered in fabric or mesh.
attribute_armrest_style: Pair of straight, padded armrests attached to the seat sides, made of plastic with possible soft top surfaces.
